string.text: Stalker, get over here. I need someone who knows which end of the rifle lead comes out of, and you look in shape.
You look like you haven't slept in days. What's the problem?

It's the Garbage. There's a smuggler baron up there named Kovalchuk. He’s set up a toll on the main route. He's bleeding our rookies dry, confiscating their artifacts, and leaving them to the mutants. I sent one of my best scouts, a kid named Artyom, to trail Kovalchuk to his main stash. We were going to hit him where it hurts.
Let me guess. Artyom missed his check in.

Three hours ago. Artyom is a ghost, he doesn't just 'miss' check-ins. His last coordinates were a collapsed tunnel on the eastern edge of the Garbage. I can't leave the village undefended to go looking for him. I need you to go up there, find Artyom, and find out what Kovalchuk is up to.
I'll find him, Wolf. Hang tight.
Sorry, I'm not a charity. Sidorovich pays me for work. What are you offering?

I don't have Sidorovich's rubles, but I have a stash of AP rounds and some meds but if you really impress me..I might throw something extra waiting for you if you bring me solid intel. Just get it done.
Kovalchuk? Doesn't he travel with heavily armed guards? At least send me with someone.
Hmm to be truthful, I've been holding back Hip from going there herself, have a chat with her. Don't fuck this up.
oh shit...forgot what i was saying.
